purpose: Capture post-foundation implementation gaps and follow-up work without mixing in Enterprise or KRITIS scope.

items.title: Wire domain action router into production task execution path
items.notes: Current router is foundation skeleton; production execution integration is still pending.

items.title: Extend domain audit with CI artifact publishing
items.notes: Publish domain audit report in CI artifacts for release evidence review.

items.title: Harden domain retrieval tests with retrieval backend contract fixtures
items.notes: Add integration-like fixtures for source-type routing and bounded chunk selection.

items.title: Implement Blender addon runtime skeleton
items.notes: Deliver addon bootstrap and bridge runtime files before any runtime_mvp claim.

items.title: Add Blender smoke runner and runtime evidence capture
items.notes: Required for promoting Blender from foundation_only to runtime_mvp.

items.title: Align Blender task IDs to generic service ownership map
items.notes: Keep blender-specific tasks from reintroducing duplicated registry/policy/retrieval logic.

items.title: Prepare FreeCAD domain descriptor baseline
items.notes: Descriptor/capability groundwork only; no runtime execution in this cleanup scope.

items.title: Prepare KiCad domain descriptor baseline
items.notes: Descriptor/capability groundwork only; no runtime execution in this cleanup scope.

scope_guardrails: No Enterprise-only RBAC, tenancy or KRITIS requirements are included in this cleanup todo.
Cleanup remains OSS-foundation focused and additive to the existing hub-governed architecture.
